title: Check Current System State On The Overall System API Page
summary: View the System State field on the Overall System Aveva API page to determine the current state the system is in.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to check the current system state from the Overall System Aveva API page.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer a system state if the System State field is blank, unclear, or unavailable.
Do not use this procedure to determine meanings of specific state values, because this source segment does not enumerate possible state values.

responsibilities: Access the Overall System Aveva API page.
Read and report the displayed state exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This procedure is source-supported as a view/read/report action only.
Do not infer a state if the System State field is blank, unclear, or unavailable.
Escalate if the page cannot be accessed or the System State field is not visible.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page

access_required: Access to the Overall System Aveva API page

visual_references.description: Overall System Aveva API page showing the System State field and related system-level items on the left side.

steps.title: Open the Overall System Aveva API page
steps.purpose: Reach the page where the System State field is displayed.
steps.instruction: Open or navigate to the Overall System Aveva API page referred to in training as the API page.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System Aveva API page is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The API page opens and shows system-level items on the left side, including System State.
steps.failure_condition: The page cannot be accessed or does not display the expected API page content.

actions.label: Open API page
actions.exact_action: Open or navigate to the Overall System Aveva API page referred to in training as the API page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Overall System Aveva API page with system-level items on the left side, including the System State field.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed page is not the Overall System Aveva API page.
The System State field is not visible after opening the page.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The speaker says all of this is through APIs and refers to the screen as the API page; the slide shows the Overall System Aveva API page with system-level items on the left.

steps.title: Locate the System State field
steps.purpose: Identify the specific field that reports the current system state.
steps.instruction: Locate the System State field on the page.
steps.expected_result: The System State field is identified on the Overall System Aveva API page.
steps.healthy_condition: The System State field is visible and distinguishable on the page.
steps.failure_condition: The System State field is not visible, cannot be identified, or is unclear.

actions.label: Find System State
actions.exact_action: Locate the System State field on the page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The System State field on the left side of the Overall System Aveva API page.

stop_or_escalate_if: The System State field is not visible.
The field location is unclear on the page.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: 'System State ... Shows the current state the system is in.'
The speaker says all of this is through APIs and refers to the screen as the API page; the slide shows the Overall System Aveva API page with system-level items on the left.

steps.title: Read the displayed system state
steps.purpose: Determine the current state the system is in from the displayed field value.
steps.instruction: Read the value shown in System State as the current state the system is in.
steps.expected_result: The current system state is identified from the displayed System State value.
steps.healthy_condition: A readable value is shown in the System State field.
steps.failure_condition: The System State field is blank, unclear, or unavailable.

actions.label: Read state value
actions.exact_action: Read the value shown in System State as the current state the system is in.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The value displayed in the System State field.

stop_or_escalate_if: The System State field is blank.
The System State field is unavailable.
You would need to infer the state rather than read it directly.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: 'System State ... Shows the current state the system is in.'

steps.title: Record or report the state exactly as shown
steps.purpose: Preserve the observed system state without interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record or report the displayed state exactly as shown.
steps.expected_result: The observed system state is documented or communicated exactly as displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: The reported or recorded state matches the displayed System State value exactly.
steps.failure_condition: The state is paraphrased, inferred, or recorded when the displayed value is blank or unclear.

actions.label: Document displayed state
actions.exact_action: Record or report the displayed state exactly as shown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed System State value to copy exactly as shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed state cannot be read clearly enough to record exactly.
The field is blank or unavailable.
You are being asked to infer or reinterpret the state.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text: 'System State ... Shows the current state the system is in.'

success_criteria: The Overall System Aveva API page is accessed.
The System State field is located.
A readable System State value is observed.
The displayed state is recorded or reported exactly as shown.
healthy_conditions: The API page is visible and matches the training reference.
The System State field is visible on the page.
The System State field contains a readable value representing the current system state.
failure_conditions: The Overall System Aveva API page cannot be accessed.
The System State field is not visible.
The System State field is blank, unclear, or unavailable.
The user would need to infer the state instead of reading it directly.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Overall System Aveva API page cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the System State field is not visible.
Do not infer a state if the field is blank, unclear, or unavailable; escalate instead.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System Aveva API page and the System State field.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Slide text: 'System State ... Shows the current state the system is in.'
